title: The Straw Hats Reach Egghead
description: On pages 10–11, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Franky, Law, Unknown person #11, Blackbeard, Luffy as The Straw Hats reach Egghead, meet Bonney, and discover Vegapunk’s impossible future island while Law is drawn into Blackbeard’s ambush.
scene: The Straw Hats reach Egghead, meet Bonney, and discover Vegapunk’s impossible future island while Law is drawn into Blackbeard’s ambush.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: OOOH... HE'S MANAGED TO NULLIFY THE DSEASE...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's how diseases go, an "antibody" always comes along. And when one person finds a remedy, it's not long before every one's cured.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd expect no less from a pirate worth 3 billion!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wee ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha! My buff-Buff fruit powers are the Frickin' best!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was entertaining though. Right? I call this one the MALADY transfer-nation PLAGUE!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm gonna send you over to the island!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WEE HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: How'd he get in front of us?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These guys have hunted down some insane powers... no wonder their bouties keep rising!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ZE HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When you, kid, and straw hat left wano. I knew one of ya would end up here.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I had no way of known' which of you would show!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is that any way to speak to a fellow member of the worst generation?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just how many lode poneGlyph rubbings have ya got? I'll be takin' them off your hands!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You took the words right out of my mouth.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With Big Mom and Kaido Gone. The world's gonna turn on its head!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ZE HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Let's settle this, winner takes all!!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Opening through 38 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
